summary: Q1 2026: Net income $8.584B, NII $15.745B, share repurchases $10.849B (213.6M shares). Q1 EPS $1.11 beat estimate $1.01 by 9.9%. Raised full-year 2026 NII growth guidance to 6%-8%. Completed $14B Oracle data center bond sale (Apr 26). Extended Alaska Air co-branded credit card deal (Apr 20). Redeemed $3B senior notes (Apr 23). Daiwa raised PT from $58 to $61 (Apr 28).
